final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational knowledge card for children explaining the story of 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from the Three Kingdoms era (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "儿童卡通画故事" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 连环画 (Chinese sequential art tradition), Sanrio character illustration heritage, 1980s-90s Chinese children's book illustration; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be single large knowledge card layout with clear title area and bullet-point sidebar for key facts
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story narrative in cartoon story form
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an engaging, child-friendly atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, appealing direction for children — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include a clear title about 赤壁之战; must include key points listed with punctuation in the sidebar
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must be suitable for children audience; single card format
Avoid:
